custom_filename.mechanism: not observed — filename is fixed as SKILL.md

description.mechanism: yaml frontmatter key: description (required); documents what the skill does and when Gemini should use it — drives auto-invocation decisions

display_name.mechanism: yaml frontmatter key: name (required); value should match the skill's directory name

providerExtensions.name: Supporting file directories
providerExtensions.description: Skills may include optional subdirectories alongside SKILL.md for organizing supporting resources: scripts/ for executable scripts, references/ for static documentation, and assets/ for templates and other resources. The skill-creator built-in generates these three directories automatically. Only SKILL.md is required.

providerExtensions.name: Built-in skill-creator skill
providerExtensions.description: Gemini CLI ships a built-in skill named skill-creator that generates new skill directories from a natural language prompt (e.g. "create a new skill called code-reviewer"). It creates the skill directory, SKILL.md with required frontmatter, and the standard scripts/, references/, and assets/ subdirectories.
